architecture_fit.note: Dot-product logits plus a single content-specific inhibition term — a minimal, attention-like delta that makes the target logit itself drop, solving the NOT task quantitatively.

baseline_comparison.note: Plain-dot-product baseline measured under identical conditions; large positive lift (0.93 at canonical, positive across the whole sweep) shown directly in the viz.

faithfulness.note: Hand-built mechanism is trivially 'used' by construction; lift-over-baseline is the only causal contrast, but the circuit hardcodes the exact seed-42 neg_anchor (privileged knowledge) and no explicit ablation/check is proposed.

operating_range.note: Covers the full cos superposition sweep (0.0–0.9), degrades gracefully and visibly (0.93→0.71) as marker collapses onto target — the goal's relevant axis.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Entirely hand-set circuit (detect marker via projection onto known anchor, subtract SCALE×strength) reproducing the target behaviour — exactly the hand-written-mechanism case.

visual_judgement.note: Four coordinated panels (sharpness sweep, attention bars, lift, schematic) make the claim legible; slightly busy but each panel earns its place.

visualisation_rationale.note: README justifies each panel and ties the sweep/lift to the NOT claim and the baseline contrast clearly.

notes: A clean, well-visualised hand-built NOT that strongly beats the plain-dot-product baseline (canonical sharpness 0.93, robustness 0.93) and degrades gracefully across superposition. It lands as borderline rather than pass because the mechanism reads the data-generator's exact seed-42 anchor (privileged knowledge) and offers no explicit ablation/causal check on a model — faithfulness rests entirely on the baseline contrast. Excellent as the hardcoded-weights case.
